missingData.title: Missing information
missingData.description: To use this tool you need to fill in the following information:

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred while loading the tool. This may be due to missing data or a technical bug.

noProfile.title: No active profile
noProfile.description: You need a profile to use the goal calculator.

header.title: Goal Calculator
header.descriptionWithBodyFat: Calculate your target weight and timeline to reach your body fat goal
header.descriptionWithoutBodyFat: Calculate your target weight and timeline

infoAlert.title: About the Goal Calculator
infoAlert.descriptionWithBodyFat: This calculator estimates your target weight based on desired body fat % and preserved lean mass.
infoAlert.descriptionWithoutBodyFat: This calculator helps you set weight goals and calculate timelines. Add body fat % to your profile for more detailed calculations.
infoAlert.disclaimer: The timeline is an estimate - actual results may vary depending on training, diet and individual factors.

currentStatus.title: Your Current Status
currentStatus.bmiMissing: ⚠️ BMI section shown when you add your height to your profile

bmi.title: BMI (Body Mass Index)
bmi.description: Weight index according to WHO standard
bmi.disclaimer: NOTE: BMI does not account for muscle mass. Use together with body fat % for a better assessment.

bodyFatRef.title: Body fat %
bodyFatRef.description: Categories according to the American Council on Exercise (ACE)

goal.title: Set your goal
goal.descriptionWithBodyFat: Choose desired target weight or body fat %
goal.syncHint: 💡 Target Body Fat% and Target Body Weight sync automatically when you change either one

weeklyChange.title: Weekly Weight Change
weeklyChange.noGoalHint: Select an energy goal to see available options
weeklyChange.weightLossLabel: Weight loss - Choose pace according to Energy Goal:
weeklyChange.weightGainLabel: Weight gain - Choose pace according to Energy Goal:

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.disclaimer: * Estimate based on preserved lean mass and selected weight change interval.

noProfile.title: No active profile
noProfile.description: You need a profile to use the MET calculator.

header.title: MET Activity Calculator
header.description: Calculate calories burned from over 1100 activities with metric units
header.source: Based on the 2024 Compendium of Physical Activities, published in Journal of Sport and Health Science

search.title: Search Activities
search.searchPlaceholder: Search by activity, code or intensity...
search.searchTip: Tip: Search for "light", "moderate", "high" or "very high" for intensity level

toast.missingWeight: Please fill in your weight first
toast.calcError: Could not calculate calories. Check your values.

noProfile.title: No active profile
noProfile.description: You need a profile to use the TDEE calculator.

header.title: TDEE & Calorie Calculator
header.description: Calculate your total daily energy expenditure and calorie range for your goals

infoCards.bmrRmrModal: BMR vs RMR - The difference explained
infoCards.palMetModal: PAL vs MET - Activity levels explained
infoCards.lbmFfmModal: LBM vs FFM - Fat-free mass explained

weight.title: Weight for calculation
weight.description: Choose which weight to use for the TDEE calculation
weight.useManualDetail: Enter a custom weight for the calculation
weight.fieldHint: This value is used to calculate BMR and TDEE.
weight.logHint: Log your weight in Weight Tracking to use it here.

bodyFat.title: Body fat percentage (optional)
bodyFat.description: Some BMR formulas require body fat percentage for more accurate calculations
bodyFat.fieldHint: Required for formulas like Cunningham, MacroFactor FFM/Athlete and Fitness Stuff Podcast

bmr.title: BMR/RMR formula
bmr.description: Choose a formula to calculate your basal metabolic rate
bmr.bodyFatWarning: This formula requires body fat percentage. Please fill in body fat percentage above.

pal.title: PAL system (Activity level)
pal.description: Choose a system to calculate your physical activity level

results.title: Your Results
results.description: Basal metabolic rate and total daily energy expenditure

toast.overwriteConfirm: You already have a saved TDEE value. Do you want to overwrite it with the new calculation?
toast.saved: TDEE has been saved to your profile!

missingFieldAlert.single: To use this tool you need to fill in: {{field}}
missingFieldAlert.multiple: To use this tool you need to fill in: {{fields}}

comparison.title: Your details
comparison.description: Fill in your values to compare all BMR/RMR formulas
comparison.fillInValues: Fill in age, weight and height to see results
comparison.span: Range: {{diff}} kcal difference between lowest and highest

noProfile.title: No active profile
noProfile.description: You need a profile to use the genetic muscle potential tool.

header.title: Genetic Muscle Potential
header.description: Calculate your maximum muscle mass based on height and body structure

maleOnly.title: Genetic Muscle Potential is for men only
maleOnly.description: These models and frameworks (Martin Berkhan's model, Casey Butt's model, Alan Aragon's framework and Lyle McDonald's framework) are all developed and validated for men. They do not account for women's physiology and hormonal differences, meaning the results would not be accurate or useful for women.

addBodyFatTip.title: Tip: Add body fat percentage
addBodyFatTip.description: To see your current progress towards genetic potential and how many kg of lean mass you have left to build, we recommend entering your body fat percentage in your profile. The calculations work without this, but you get more insightful information with body fat percentage.
addBodyFatTip.link: Go to Profile to enter body fat percentage

infoCard.title: About Genetic Muscle Potential
infoCard.description: These models estimate your maximum natural muscle mass. Results vary between formulas depending on what factors they consider. No formula is 100% accurate, but they provide a useful guideline for realistic goals.

palFields.customPALHint: Enter your own PAL value if you know it
